zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Eure於大約1240年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯時，他的父親John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta49歲，母親Ada de Balliol41歲。他於大約1248年與Agnes De Bertram在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1295年8月7日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德米特福德享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Eure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ewer
meanings: English (Hertfordshire, Middlesex, and Buckinghamshire): occupational name from Middle English ewere, a shortened form of ewerer ‘servant who supplied guests at the table with water to wash their hands’. The word ewerer is itself a derivative of Old French and Middle English ewer ‘water pitcher’, also recorded in Middle English as ower. Compare Lower .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Eure was born about 1240, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta, was 49 and his mother, Ada de Balliol, was 41. He married Agnes De Bertram about 1248, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 7 August 1295, in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh d’Eure est né environ 1240, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Ada de Balliol, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Agnes De Bertram environ 1248, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 7 août 1295, à Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Eure um 1240 in Warkworth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta 49 und seine Mutter Ada de Balliol 41. Er hat um 1248 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes De Bertram geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 7. August 1295 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Eureが約1240年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスで生まれた時，父John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Cartaは49歳，母Ada de Balliolは41歳であった。約1248年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでAgnes De Bertramと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1295年8月7日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Eure(이)가 대략 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada de Balliol(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1248년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Agnes De Bertram(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1295년 8월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Eure nasceu aproximadamente 1240, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Ada de Balliol, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes De Bertram aproximadamente 1248, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Eure родился около 1240 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Fitzrobert de Stokes 3d Baron Warkworth, Surety of the Magna Carta было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada de Balliol, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes De Bertram около 1248 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 7 августа 1295 г. в местности митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.
